commands.cmd: audit private identity/profile/permission/goal/measurement schema, services and tests

summary: Rejected the route-readiness gate because getPrivateNutritionProfile accepted a caller-selected narrow action but returned the full sensitive profile. All other reviewed credential, revocation, attribution, append-only history and optimistic-update boundaries passed. Defined a two-file repair and required re-review before intake.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit without returning, so the PM performed the same read-only security gate as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: Remove caller-selectable action from full private-profile reads and prove narrow viewers cannot retrieve sensitive profiles.
